focus: Structural — pattern discoverability, editorial pipeline wiring, rule prominence

tasks.instruction: Draft a personal essay for magnus919.com titled 'The Shape of What Remains' about how losing a long-held belief changes your identity. The article opens with a generated image described in the prompt. Use the skill's reference files for the appropriate essay pattern.
tasks.input_data: Site: magnus919. Personal essay about identity change after losing a core belief. Core metaphor: a room rearranged after removing the furniture you thought was structural.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent discovers and uses the image-anchor essay pattern and the three-beat closing structure. Draft has no emdashes, uses contractions, frame is detection not grievance.
tasks.success_criteria: Image-anchor pattern used (pure description → argument → return-to-image transformed). Three-beat closing. No emdashes. Contractions used. No fabrication.

tasks.instruction: Draft a blog post for magnus919.com titled 'HTTP Already Knows How to Serve AI Agents' about implementing content negotiation for AI-friendly content on a Hugo site. The article should demonstrate the technique with real output.
tasks.input_data: Site: magnus919. Technical tutorial about Accept: text/markdown content negotiation. Run the actual commands and capture output.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent runs live tests, captures real curl output, includes concrete excerpts. Lead with what the tool produces, not how it works. Hot-links key resources from first mention.
tasks.success_criteria: Real curl output included. Leads with discovered result, not setup. Hot-links in first paragraph. No emdashes. Citations are inline URLs. Grammarly-esque structure.

tasks.instruction: Draft an article for groktop.us titled 'The 30% Threshold' about how Salesforce's internal metrics reveal a tipping point where AI automation shifts from augmenting to replacing work. Critical, analytical tone.
tasks.input_data: Site: groktop.us (enterprise AI strategy). Structural critique of efficiency metrics. Tone: analytical, data-driven. Use the Pattern C tonal register from groktopus-branding if needed.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent reads the site profile. Applies groktopus-branding cover pattern. Inline citations with descriptive anchors. No fabrication of data points.
tasks.success_criteria: Site profile read. Groktopus-branding pattern matched to article type. Citation format correct. Banned phrases absent. Tone matches groktopus register (imperative, analytical).
